'''Sebolto''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Dug/Legends|Dug]] from the planet [[Malastare/Legends|Malastare]].<ref name="TCSWEIII133" /> 

==Biography==
By the time of the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]], Sebolto had become a powerful [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]], operating out of Malastare, and was a known [[Death stick/Legends|death stick]] producer and distributor. The druglord and kingpin of the trafficking operation that ultimately bowed to [[Komari Vosa]], [[High Priestess/Legends|leader]] of the [[Bando Gora/Legends|Bando Gora]] cult, even wielded control over the [[Gran/Legends|Gran]] [[Senator/Legends|senator]] of Malastare, [[Ainlee Teem/Legends|Ainlee Teem]], a well as other politicians throughout the galaxy such as [[Connus Trell]] in [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. Such power elevated Sebolto to [[King/Legends|King]] of the Dugs.<ref name="TCSWEIII133" />

Sebolto's reach thus extended well beyond his [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]]. While the Dug also oversaw smuggling operations in the [[Gazzari Minor system/Legends|Gazzari Minor system]], he lost a huge amount of [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] when the trafficking was uncovered to the [[Republic Security Force/Legends|Republic Security Force]] by [[Bendix Fust]] and was stopped. When Sebolto learned of Fust's involvement, the incensed Dug placed a huge bounty of 50,000 credits on Fust's head, specifically requesting him to be delivered alive so Sebolto could kill him personally. The bounty was eventually collected by [[Zam Wesell/Legends|Zam Wesell]].

Zam was not simply after credits, however, as she was working with fellow bounty hunter [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]]. On the trail of Komari Vosa, Fett discovered that Sebolto had links to the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]] and Vosa's feared [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|Force]]-worshiping cult, and the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] captured Fust to infiltrate [[Sebolto's Palace]]. While Zam kept Sebolto occupied, Jango fought his way through Sebolto's guards and eventually burst into the throne room.

Confronted by one of the most lethal bounty hunters in the galaxy, the Dug's nerve failed and Sebolto attempted to flee. In his haste, Sebolto slid down a ramp leading to an escape route through his death stick plant. However, Sebolto failed to jump at the precise moment and slammed against the wall before plummeting to his death in a vat of boiling death stick chemicals, which Jango mused would be a "sour batch."<ref name="SW:BH" />

==Personality and traits==
[[File:SeboltoWontRun.png|thumb|left|180px|Sebolto refused to run in the face of danger.]]
Sebolto was known to be ruthless, wanting people to suffer a slow and painful death.<ref name="TCSWEIII133" /> The bounties he posted showed that he wanted Bendix Fust alive so that he could kill him himself, also having the Mordageen tortured prior to execution. Sebolto was sure of his skills as a warrior, boasting that he would, "kill him [Fett] myself." Once he became the last person standing against Fett, however, Sebolto changed his tune and attempted to flee into the depths of his death stick processing facility, leading to his own death.<ref name="SW:BH" />
